events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the fillet gauge check shows the weld running undersize (~3/16 in vs. a 1/4 in required leg), which fails AWS D1.1 acceptance criteria with no tolerance allowance for that magnitude of deficiency. Marked `fail` / `high` risk given reduced joint throat on what appears to be a structural connection, with actions to tag as NCR, hold the station, and reweld/reinspect per the shop WPS before proceeding.
